summary: Iteration 53 - File Attachments for Calendar Events. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend testing verified CMS Global Events Manager with file upload/remove capabilities and My Account Events Calendar with file download links.

issues: React hydration warnings in console (span inside tbody/select/option) - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

seed_data_creation: Test files uploaded during backend tests (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: File attachments feature fully tested. Backend /api/upload-file endpoint accepts PDF/PPT/DOC/XLS/CSV/TXT/ZIP/images (max 25MB), rejects unsupported types. Calendar events store attachments array with url/name/size/content_type. CMS GlobalEventsManager.js has file upload area with add/remove. My Account GlobalCalendar.js shows download links with Paperclip icon. Files served via /api/uploads/filename.
